fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the entry, such as active, non-active, or cancelled.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service order associated with this entry.

fields.name: Allocation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the resource allocation should start.

fields.name: Resource No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the resource allocated to the service task in this entry.

fields.name: Resource Group No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the resource group allocated to the service task in this entry.

fields.name: Service Item Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item line linked to this entry.

fields.name: Allocated Hours
fields.tooltip: Specifies the hours allocated to the resource or resource group for the service task in this entry.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when you want the allocation to start.

fields.name: Finishing Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when you want the allocation to finish.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the service order allocation.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item.

fields.name: Service Item Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the service item in this entry.

fields.name: Service Item Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the service item in this entry.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the document (Order or Quote) from which the allocation entry was created.
